positive: Minimalist geometric line art illustration of a celestial constellation merging with stylized forest flora. A crescent moon with delicate, abstract rings orbits around a central cluster of stylized woodland trees and ethereal wildflowers. Use a Scandinavian design aesthetic with clean, black line work against a crisp white background. Emphasize strong, negative space contrast and clean silhouettes. Include subtle elements of geometric pattern repetition within the foliage. High contrast, dotwork stippling texture for depth, vector graphic quality, perfectly centered composition, suitable for apparel printing.
